name: Lemon Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat eggs, yolks, and sugar together at high speed for two minutes.
3. Add butter and cream; beat again at high speed for two minutes.
4. Add flour, cornmeal, lemon juice, and rind; mix well.
5. Pour into crust and bake 45–60 minutes until top is medium brown (test with a toothpick).
6. Allow to cool to room temperature before serving with whipped cream topping if desired.
7. Serves: 6 slices.
